authors_reviews.title: Not reliable when plugged into wall socket plug
authors_reviews.text: I ordered these in a pack of 4. Have 3 away and have one at work. I work 2 days a week and don’t use the charger every day. Point is, that it’s been very gently and infrequently used. If I plug the cord into my computer ot works well. However, when I plug it into the wall with the block, it’s hit and miss. Sometimes works, sometimes doesn’t, and sometimes works for a while but then seems to disconnect after a short time. I wouldn’t buy this again.
authors_reviews.author: K Douglas
